dc_description: A sunlit rural path or narrow road curves through a densely wooded area with dry grass, vines, and trees on both sides. On the right, an orange directional sign mounted on a metal pole reads "via Francigena" and "sentiero alternativo," with a left-pointing arrow and small trail icons. Additional smaller signs are posted on the left side near the vegetation.
novel_visual_observations: The main sign points left while the visible road bends into a shaded cut between earthen banks.
A small sign on the left appears to mark a protected or monitored area, mounted above a weathered blue-framed notice.
rich_context: Via Formellese, Municipio Roma XV, Olgiata, Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, Italia
